reviews.comment:
Te atienden bien y rápido, si no te agarra el cambio de turno a las 14. Única YPF de la zona aún con el aire GRATIS. Lo único malo el sistema de facturas A se tilda un poco

(Translated by Google)
They serve you well and quickly, unless you're caught by the 2 PM shift change. It's the only YPF in the area still offering FREE air conditioning. The only downside is that the invoice system (type A) freezes up a bit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12305613765678893423/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpaU5UM1NBEAE
